label: help_init
stdout:
doxa init - Initialize Doxa Research configuration

Description:
  Sets up Doxa Research configuration file and verifies environment.
  Creates default configuration at ~/.config/doxa/doxa.config.toml

Usage:
  doxa init

What it does:
  • Checks Python and UV package manager
  • Creates configuration directory
  • Generates default doxa.config.toml file
  • Sets up provider API key placeholders

Configuration file location:
  <HOME>/.config/doxa/doxa.config.toml

After initialization:
  1. Set your API keys as environment variables:
     export OPENAI_API_KEY='your-api-key'
     export PERPLEXITY_API_KEY='your-api-key'
  2. Or edit the config file directly

Examples:
  # Initialize configuration
  $ doxa init

Related commands:
  doxa help       - Show general help
